hero.heading:
Honoring Lives,
Preserving
Memories
hero.description: We help families and loved ones to create dignified obituaries and digital memorials, preserving stories, photos, and tributes—while respectfully contributing to broader insights that help us understand life and loss.

features.heading: Everything You Need in One Platform
features.subheading: Create heartfelt Obituaries, preserve memories with Digital Memorials, and explore comprehensive Insights—all in one powerful platform.

obituary.title: Obituary
obituary.description: Create an Obituary to honor your loved one. Share their story, celebrate their life, and leave a lasting tribute for friends and family to cherish.

memorials.title: Digital Memorials
memorials.description: Create beautiful, lasting tributes for your loved ones. Share memories, photos, and stories with family and friends worldwide.

services.title: Funeral Services
services.description: Connect with trusted funeral service providers for arrangements, locations, and community support during a difficult time.

insights.title: Insights
insights.description: Powerful visualization tools help you understand trends, patterns, and insights from mortality data.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.description: Your data is protected with enterprise-grade encryption. We never share your information without your consent.

community.title: Community Support
community.description: Join thousands of families and researchers. Share experiences, find support, and contribute to our collective knowledge.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.subheading: Watch our step-by-step video guides to learn how to use MATIEO's powerful features.

memorials.title: Memorials
memorials.description: Discover how to build a beautiful digital memorial to preserve cherished memories.

obituary.title: Obituary
obituary.description: Learn how to create a meaningful obituary that honors your loved one's life and legacy.

insights.title: Insights
insights.description: Explore powerful analytics tools that provide comprehensive mortality insights and research.

stats.heading: Trusted by Thousands
stats.subheading: Our platform serves families, researchers, and organizations with reliable data and compassionate services.

testimonials.heading: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subheading: Join thousands of satisfied families, researchers, and organizations who trust MATIEO.

items.quote: "MATIEO's comprehensive database has been invaluable for our mortality research. The depth of data and ease of access has significantly accelerated our work."
items.name: Dr. Sarah Chen

items.quote: "Creating a memorial for my father was a beautiful experience. The platform made it easy to share memories and connect with family across the world."
items.name: Michael Rodriguez

items.quote: "The historical data and search capabilities are outstanding. I've been able to trace family histories spanning multiple generations with remarkable ease."
items.name: Emma Thompson

items.quote: "We use MATIEO for our hospital system's reporting needs. The real-time data and intuitive dashboard have transformed how we analyze patient outcomes."
items.name: Jordan Park

items.quote: "The support we received during a difficult time was exceptional. MATIEO truly understands the needs of grieving families and provides thoughtful tools."
items.name: Lisa Anderson

items.quote: "The API integration was seamless, and the data quality is consistently excellent. Our analytics platform has greatly benefited from this partnership."
items.name: David Kim

deleteDraft.description: This will permanently delete the draft and all its photos. This cannot be undone.

unpublish.description: The memorial will no longer be publicly accessible. It will be saved as a draft and you can republish it at any time.

createObituary.heading: Let's create an online obituary
createObituary.subheading: We are deeply sorry for your loss and are committed to helping you create a beautiful obituary.
createObituary.sectionFuneralSubtitle: Resident, religious home, funeral center, etc.
createObituary.consentLabel: I consent to this information being used anonymously for mortality insights research
createObituary.deathCertUpload: Upload death certificate (PDF, PNG, JPG up to 10MB)
createObituary.causePrivateNote: This information will never appear on the public obituary. With consent, it may be used anonymously for insights.
createObituary.deathCertPrivateNote: This document will be kept private and used only for verification purposes.
createObituary.deathCertDesc: Upload a copy of the death certificate for verification purposes
